zh.lifeSummary: 當Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint於大約1065年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾瑟納特時，他的父親Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch56歲，母親Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr21歲。他於1057年之前與Clydwen verch Gruffydd在威爾士結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1091年在威爾士韋斯特 威爾斯享年27歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾卡馬特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint于大约1065年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾瑟納特时，他的父亲Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch56岁，母亲Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr21岁。他于1057年之前与Clydwen verch Gruffydd在威尔士结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1091年在威尔士韋斯特 威爾斯享年27岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾卡馬特。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Fawr,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for a (black)smith, Romanian faur, from Latin faber.
in some cases also from a popular Romanian name for the February, applied as a nickname to a person born in this month.

en.lifeSummary: When Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint was born about 1065, in Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch, was 56 and his mother, Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr, was 21. He married Clydwen verch Gruffydd before 1057, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1091, in West Wales, Wales, at the age of 27, and was buried in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint est né environ 1065, à Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Clydwen verch Gruffydd avant 1057, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1091, à West Wales, Galles, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint um 1065 in Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch 56 und seine Mutter Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr 21. Er hat vor 1057 in Wales Clydwen verch Gruffydd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1091 im Alter von 27 Jahren in West Wales, Wales und wurde in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint è nato il circa 1065 nel Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Clydwen verch Gruffydd prima del 1057, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1091, nel West Wales, Galles, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saintが約1065年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアセナルスで生まれた時，父Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuchは56歳，母Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanrは21歳であった。1057年以前にウェールズでClydwen verch Gruffyddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1091年にウェールズウエスト ワレスで27歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカーマースンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint(이)가 대략 1065년 웨일스 카마테실르 세나르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1057년 이전 웨일스에서 Clydwen verch Gruffydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1091년 웨일스 웨스트 월스에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 카마테에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Clydwen verch Gruffydd antes 1057, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1091, em West Wales, Gales, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint родился около 1065 г. в местности кенарт, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Clydwen verch Gruffydd перед 1057 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1091 г. в местности вест веилесь, Уэльс в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint nació aproximadamente 1065, en Cenarth, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Cydifor Fawr ap Collwyn, of Blaen Cuch, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Elen verch Llwch Liawen Fawr of Cilsanr, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Clydwen verch Gruffydd antes de 1057, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1091, en West Wales, Gales, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
